name: QRadar - Ransomware Activity Indicators
description: Detects massive file modifications or suspicious extension changes
aql_query: SELECT sourceip, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCETYPENAME(devicetype) LIKE '%' AND (UTF8(payload) LIKE '%.locked' OR UTF8(payload) LIKE '%.crypto') GROUP BY sourceip HAVING COUNT(*) > 100 LAST 2 MINUTES
